description: Atomic final JSON of a health script run, covering all three phases (pre-detection / remediation / post-detection) emitted by IME after the policy completes. Single source of truth for health-script outcomes — replaces the line-by-line HS-COMPLIANCE/HS-EXITCODE/HS-STDOUT/HS-STDERR patterns. The end-anchor and [\s\S] character class are defensive against future format changes and multi-line CMTrace buffering.
